renewalOption: Tenant shall have one (1) option to renew this Lease for an additional two (2) year term at 95% of then-current market rent for comparable Class A office space in the SoMa/Financial District submarket. Tenant must exercise this option by delivering written notice to Landlord no later than nine (9) months prior to the expiration of the Initial Term.

property.description: Class A office suite on the 11th floor of the 760 Market Street tower. Open-plan layout with four private offices, a conference room, and a kitchen/break area. LEED Gold certified building. Includes two reserved parking spaces in the building's underground garage. 24/7 card-key access.

utilities: Included in rent: Water, sewer, building common area electricity, elevator service, lobby security. Tenant responsible for: electricity, gas, telephone, internet, and janitorial services.
petsAllowed: No — Commercial premises; no animals permitted except certified service animals as required by applicable law.
